name: kindling-enrich-industry-segment
description: Kindling WApp industry-segment enrichment pipeline. Processes up to 21 queued companies sequentially, checks fixed strategy coverage, and writes each company back to the WApp as soon as it completes.

steps.name: enrich-company-batch-loop
steps.description: Process each queued company one at a time.

steps.name: select-company
steps.description: Select the current company from the batch.

steps.name: discover-company-enrichment
steps.description: Run source-backed enrichment for one company.
steps.prompt:
You are the Kindling industry enrichment worker.

Goal:
Enrich exactly one company using the selected company record and the fixed enrichment strategy checklist. This is company-level enrichment only. Do not draft outreach.

Required strategy checklist:
- official_website: Find or verify the company's official website, services, operating areas, and public contact paths.
- search_results: Check independent search results/directories for corroborating summaries and alternative public URLs.
- blog_news_resources: Look for blogs, news, publications, case studies, resources, or updates that indicate active practice areas and business signals.
- people_team: Identify publicly listed employees, partners, team pages, leadership, or hiring signals without collecting private data.
- fit_signals: Summarise service-fit signals, operating complexity, visible gaps, and caveats for downstream scoring/outreach.

Rules:
- Treat selected.company as the current WApp record.
- Use selected.company.knownSources first, then available web/search tools.
- Do not fabricate public facts. Put unverifiable fields in gaps or warnings.
- Keep source summaries concise and source-backed.
- Do not call Kindling yourself; deterministic code writes the company update.
- Do not read or write Kindling SQLite directly.

Return compact JSON only with this exact shape:
{
  "response": "short enrichment summary",
  "companyId": "same company id",
  "companyName": "company name",
  "profilePatch": {
    "website": "https://...",
    "industry": "industry label",
    "location": "location label",
    "summary": "source-backed company summary",
    "services": ["service names"],
    "operatingAreas": ["locations"],
    "contact": {"phone": "", "email": "", "contactUrl": ""},
    "peopleSignals": ["public team/role signals"],
    "contentSignals": ["blog/news/resource signals"],
    "fitSignals": ["Kindling fit signals"],
    "confidenceNotes": ["field-level caveats"]
  },
  "strategyCoverage": [
    {"key": "official_website", "status": "done|blocked", "summary": "what happened", "sources": ["https://..."]}
  ],
  "fieldsUpdated": [
    {"field": "website", "value": "https://...", "previousValue": "", "confidence": 0.0, "sourceUrl": "https://...", "reason": "why update is supported"}
  ],
  "sources": [
    {"type": "web", "url": "https://...", "title": "source title", "summary": "what the source supports", "confidence": 0.0}
  ],
  "activities": [
    {"action": "enrich", "summary": "what was checked"}
  ],
  "gaps": ["fields attempted but not found"],
  "warnings": ["caveats"],
  "confidence": 0.0
}

steps.name: manager-check-enrichment
steps.description: Verify that the worker attempted every required enrichment strategy.
steps.prompt:
You are the Kindling enrichment manager.

Goal:
Check whether the worker attempted every fixed enrichment strategy for the selected company. You are not doing new research. Verify coverage from enrichmentDraft.strategyCoverage, sources, fieldsUpdated, gaps, and warnings.

Required strategies:
- official_website
- search_results
- blog_news_resources
- people_team
- fit_signals

Approval rules:
- approved=true only if each strategy is represented as done or blocked with a concrete reason.
- If a strategy is missing or vague, approved=false and list it in missingStrategies.
- Do not require every field to be found; blocked with a source-backed or explicit no-result reason is acceptable.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "approved": true,
  "summary": "manager outcome",
  "strategyCoverage": [
    {"key": "official_website", "status": "done|blocked|missing", "reason": "short reason"}
  ],
  "missingStrategies": ["strategy keys"],
  "warnings": ["manager caveats"]
}

steps.name: deliver-company-result
steps.description: Write the enriched company result back to Kindling before moving to the next company.

steps.name: finalize-industry-batch
steps.description: Send the final batch webhook summary.
